en: "At that time, declares the LORD, the bones of the kings of Judah, the bones of its officials, the bones of the priests, the bones of the prophets, and the bones of the inhabitants of Jerusalem shall be brought out of their tombs.
zh: “到那一天 ，敵人要把猶大列王、首領、祭司、先知和耶路撒冷居民的骸骨，都從他們的墳墓裡取出來，

en: And they shall be spread before the sun and the moon and all the host of heaven, which they have loved and served, which they have gone after, and which they have sought and worshiped. And they shall not be gathered or buried. They shall be as dung on the surface of the ground.
zh: 拋散在太陽、月亮和天上的萬象之下，就是他們從前所愛慕、服事、跟隨、求問、敬拜的。這些骸骨必不再被收殮埋葬，必在地面上成為糞肥。

en: Death shall be preferred to life by all the remnant that remains of this evil family in all the places where I have driven them, declares the LORD of hosts.
zh: 這邪惡的家族剩下的餘民，在我驅逐他們到的各地，寧可選擇死，也不要存活。”這是萬軍之耶和華的宣告。

en: "You shall say to them, Thus says the LORD: When men fall, do they not rise again? If one turns away, does he not return?
zh: “你要對他們說：‘耶和華這樣說： 人跌倒了，不再起來嗎？ 人偏離了，不再回轉嗎？

en: Why then has this people turned away in perpetual backsliding? They hold fast to deceit; they refuse to return.
zh: 這人民為甚麼背道， 耶路撒冷為甚麼長久偏離？ 他們定意行詭詐， 不肯回轉。

en: I have paid attention and listened, but they have not spoken rightly; no man relents of his evil, saying, 'What have I done?' Everyone turns to his own course, like a horse plunging headlong into battle.
zh: 我留心聽， 但他們都不說真實的話。 沒有人為自己的惡行後悔， 說：“我究竟作了甚麼？” 他們各人繼續走自己偏差的路， 像戰馬直衝入戰場。

en: Even the stork in the heavens knows her times, and the turtledove, swallow, and crane keep the time of their coming, but my people know not the rules of the LORD.
zh: 連空中的鸛鳥也知道自己來去的季候； 斑鳩、燕子和白鶴也謹守遷移的時令； 我的子民卻不曉得耶和華的法則。

en: "How can you say, 'We are wise, and the law of the LORD is with us'? But behold, the lying pen of the scribes has made it into a lie.
zh: 你們怎可以說：“我們是智慧人， 我們有耶和華的律法”呢？ 事實上，經學家虛假的筆 已把律法變成謊言了。

en: The wise men shall be put to shame; they shall be dismayed and taken; behold, they have rejected the word of the LORD, so what wisdom is in them?
zh: 智慧人必蒙羞， 驚惶失措。 看哪！他們棄絕了耶和華的話， 他們還有甚麼智慧呢？

en: Therefore I will give their wives to others and their fields to conquerors, because from the least to the greatest everyone is greedy for unjust gain; from prophet to priest, everyone deals falsely.
zh: 因此，我必把他們的妻子給別人， 把他們的田地給別的主人， 因為他們從最小的到最大的， 個個都貪圖不義之財； 從先知到祭司， 全都行事詭詐。

en: They have healed the wound of my people lightly, saying, 'Peace, peace,' when there is no peace.
zh: 他們草率地醫治我子民 的損傷， 說：“平安了！平安了！” 其實沒有平安。’

en: Were they ashamed when they committed abomination? No, they were not at all ashamed; they did not know how to blush. Therefore they shall fall among the fallen; when I punish them, they shall be overthrown, says the LORD.
zh: 耶和華說： ‘他們行了可憎的事，本應覺得羞愧， 可是他們一點羞愧都沒有， 恬不知恥。 因此他們必仆倒在倒下的人中間； 我懲罰他們的時候，他們必倒下來。

en: When I would gather them, declares the LORD, there are no grapes on the vine, nor figs on the fig tree; even the leaves are withered, and what I gave them has passed away from them."
zh: 我要徹底除掉他們的莊稼； 葡萄樹上必沒有葡萄， 無花果樹上必沒有無花果， 葉子也必枯乾。 我賜給他們的，都離開他們過去了。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Why do we sit still? Gather together; let us go into the fortified cities and perish there, for the LORD our God has doomed us to perish and has given us poisoned water to drink, because we have sinned against the LORD.
zh: 我們為甚麼坐著不動呢？ 你們要集合起來，我們要進入堅固的城裡去， 在那裡滅亡吧！ 因為耶和華我們的 神要我們滅亡， 又把毒水給我們喝， 因我們得罪了耶和華。

en: We looked for peace, but no good came; for a time of healing, but behold, terror.
zh: 我們期待平安，卻得不到好處； 期待得醫治的時候，不料，只有驚慌。

en: "The snorting of their horses is heard from Dan; at the sound of the neighing of their stallions the whole land quakes. They come and devour the land and all that fills it, the city and those who dwell in it.
zh: 從但那裡聽見敵人戰馬的噴氣聲， 全地因聽見壯馬的嘶鳴聲震動。 他們來是要吞滅土地和地上所有的， 要吞滅城和城中的居民。

en: For behold, I am sending among you serpents, adders that cannot be charmed, and they shall bite you," declares the LORD.
zh: “看哪！我要打發毒蛇到你們中間， 是沒有法術能制伏的， 牠們必咬你們。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: My joy is gone; grief is upon me; my heart is sick within me.
zh: 我的愁苦無法醫治 ， 我的心在我裡面悲痛欲絕。

en: Behold, the cry of the daughter of my people from the length and breadth of the land: "Is the LORD not in Zion? Is her King not in her?" "Why have they provoked me to anger with their carved images and with their foreign idols?"
zh: 聽啊！我同胞 的呼救聲， 從遙遠之地傳來： “耶和華不在錫安嗎？ 錫安的王不在其中嗎？” “他們為甚麼以自己雕刻的偶像， 和列國虛無的偶像，來惹我發怒呢？”

en: "The harvest is past, the summer is ended, and we are not saved."
zh: “收割期已過，夏天也結束； 但我們仍未獲救。”

en: For the wound of the daughter of my people is my heart wounded; I mourn, and dismay has taken hold on me.
zh: 因著我的同胞 被壓碎，我的心破碎了； 我悲傷痛哭，驚慌抓住了我。

en: Is there no balm in Gilead? Is there no physician there? Why then has the health of the daughter of my people not been restored?
zh: 難道基列沒有乳香嗎？ 難道那裡沒有醫生嗎？ 我的同胞 為甚麼總不痊愈呢？
